name: PARTNER_TARGETS_NEW_AFTER_YEAR_BY_TARGET
description: For a target symbol, list partner targets whose pair first appears after the given year.
cypher: MATCH (t:Target {symbol:$target})<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(t2:Target) MATCH (tp)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year) WHERE t2.symbol <> $target WITH t2.symbol AS partner_target, min(y.year) AS first_year, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count WHERE first_year > $year RETURN partner_target, first_year, patent_count ORDER BY first_year ASC, patent_count DESC, partner_target LIMIT 50;
